title: Fractions, Decimals, Ratios, and Proportional Structure · Quantity Clinic: Fraction Meaning
summary: Scale recipes, medication-free training examples, mixtures, maps, and staffing plans without changing relationships. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math beg fraction meaning increment in a proportional scaling and comparison workbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Represent fractions as part-whole, quotient, ratio, operator, and location meanings in context.
Round only at a justified reporting boundary while preserving sufficient working precision.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
